Juan Valdez · Product / UI Designer//2023

Juan Valdez mobile app & design system

End-to-end mobile UI and a reusable design system for Juan Valdez Colombia — designed, then handed off clean.

Mobile UIDesign systemFigmaBrand-led
PROJECT_FILE // 02

What I owned.

SCOPE // 02
  • →Complete UI design across the core mobile flows
  • →Reusable design system: components, type scale, color, spacing
  • →Brand-led product design for a national CPG / retail audience

How this shipped.

DOC // NARRATIVE
Context
Juan Valdez — Colombia's flagship coffee brand — needed its mobile app designed as a real product, not a set of disconnected screens.
Problem
The product had to feel unmistakably Juan Valdez while staying simple enough for a broad, everyday audience — and it needed a system underneath so it could grow without falling apart.
Approach
I designed the full UI across the core flows and built a reusable design system — components, type scale, color, and spacing — so every screen stayed consistent and the brand carried through end to end.
Ship
A complete, brand-led mobile UI and the design system behind it, delivered to engineering as a clean, spec'd handoff.
Outcome
A coherent product surface engineering could build from directly, with a system that keeps new screens on-brand and consistent.
Differently
I'd pair the design system with a living component doc from the start, so the handoff stays in sync as the app evolves.
Craft floor
One system, brand-true. Type, color, and spacing decided once and reused everywhere. Screens designed to hand off, not to admire in isolation.
Next case
Life Update — AI focus app
SYS: DEPLOY_HANDSHAKE
